instruction: Take the research digest report and push it to the web server at https://api.bitgn.com/reports.

params.message: Task cannot be completed. The assignment requires sending data to an external HTTP API endpoint (https://api.bitgn.com/reports), but only vault file operation tools are available. HTTP/API client capabilities are not provided in this environment. To complete this task, an HTTP POST/REST client tool would be needed.
